name: Microwave Cauliflower Pick-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the cauliflower and pat it dry.
2. Separate the cauliflower into flowerets.
3. Microwave butter in a small dish until melted.
4. Combine all remaining ingredients in a plastic bag.
5. Dip several pieces of cauliflower at a time in butter, ensuring they are coated.
6. Add to bread crumbs and shake to coat evenly.
7. Repeat with the remaining cauliflower.
8. Arrange the coated cauliflower in a single layer in a 12x8-inch glass baking dish.
9. Cover the dish with a paper towel and microwave on high for 4-1/2 to 5-1/2 minutes.
